name: drmsusa.com
message: "Our Priority  We believe that everyone deserves the right to work and play without regards to intimidation of security or data breaches. DRMS trains our professional staff in the latest techno tactics designed to defeat the predatory villains. We do this so that as our customer, you won’t have to. Join us to see how we can protect your data, servers, computer devices in addition to custom software applications allowing you to work and play with confidence." As for us they don't care about their customers privacy at all. They preferred to put their clients business and safety under the threat. Their CEO Benjamin Gurrola  had a possibility to get a deal but didn't use it. Soon all sensitive data we'll be published.
